items.title: Dua for healing
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّ النَّاسِ أَذْهِبِ الْبَأْسَ اشْفِ أَنْتَ الشَّافِي، لَا شِفَاءَ إِلَّا شِفَاؤُكَ
items.transliteration: Allahumma Rabba an-naas, adhhib il-ba's, ishfi anta ash-Shaafi, laa shifaa'a illaa shifaa'uk.
items.translation: O Allah, Lord of mankind, remove harm and cure; You are the Healer. There is no cure except Your cure.

items.title: Visiting the sick
items.arabic: لَا بَأْسَ طَهُورٌ إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ
items.transliteration: La ba'sa, tahoorun in shaa Allah.
items.translation: No harm, it is a purification, if Allah wills.

items.title: Before eating
items.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ
items.translation: In the name of Allah.

items.title: After eating
items.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَطْعَمَنِي هَذَا وَرَزَقَنِيهِ
items.transliteration: Alhamdu lillahil-ladhi at'amani haadha wa razaqanihi.
items.translation: Praise be to Allah who fed me this and provided it for me.

items.title: Travel supplication
items.arabic: سُبْحَانَ الَّذِي سَخَّرَ لَنَا هَذَا وَمَا كُنَّا لَهُ مُقْرِنِينَ
items.transliteration: Subhanalladhi sakhkhara lana hadha wa ma kunna lahu muqrinin.
items.translation: Glory is to Him who has subjected this to us, and we could not have done it by ourselves.

items.title: Seeking righteousness in travel
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّا نَسْأَلُكَ فِي سَفَرِنَا هَذَا الْبِرَّ وَالتَّقْوَى
items.transliteration: Allahumma inna nas'aluka fi safarina hadhal-birra wat-taqwa.
items.translation: O Allah, we ask You on this journey for righteousness and piety.

items.title: Morning remembrance
items.arabic: أَصْبَحْنَا وَأَصْبَحَ الْمُلْكُ لِلَّهِ
items.translation: We have entered the morning and all dominion belongs to Allah.

items.title: Protection in the morning
items.arabic: حَسْبِيَ اللَّهُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ عَلَيْهِ تَوَكَّلْتُ
items.transliteration: Hasbiyallahu la ilaha illa Huwa, 'alayhi tawakkaltu.
items.translation: Allah is sufficient for me; there is no deity except Him. Upon Him I rely.

items.title: Evening remembrance
items.arabic: أَمْسَيْنَا وَأَمْسَى الْمُلْكُ لِلَّهِ
items.translation: We have entered the evening and all dominion belongs to Allah.

items.title: Evening protection
items.arabic: أَعُوذُ بِكَلِمَاتِ اللَّهِ التَّامَّاتِ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ
items.transliteration: A'udhu bi kalimatillahi at-tammati min sharri ma khalaq.
items.translation: I seek refuge in the perfect words of Allah from the evil of what He created.

items.title: Before prayer
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ افْتَحْ لِي أَبْوَابَ رَحْمَتِكَ
items.translation: O Allah, open for me the doors of Your mercy.

items.title: After adhan
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّ هَذِهِ الدَّعْوَةِ التَّامَّةِ
items.translation: O Allah, Lord of this perfect call...

items.title: Asking for wellness
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْعَافِيَةَ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ
items.translation: O Allah, I ask You for well-being in this world and the Hereafter.

items.title: Contentment
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ قَنِّعْنِي بِمَا رَزَقْتَنِي
items.translation: O Allah, make me content with what You have provided.

items.title: During hardship
items.arabic: إِنَّا لِلَّهِ وَإِنَّا إِلَيْهِ رَاجِعُونَ
items.transliteration: Inna lillahi wa inna ilayhi raji'un.
items.translation: Surely we belong to Allah and to Him we return.

items.title: Sufficient for us
items.arabic: حَسْبُنَا اللَّهُ وَنِعْمَ الْوَكِيلُ
items.translation: Allah is sufficient for us and the best disposer of affairs.

items.title: Talbiyah
items.arabic: لَبَّيْكَ اللَّهُمَّ لَبَّيْكَ
items.translation: Here I am, O Allah, here I am.

items.title: At Safa and Marwah
items.arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ
items.transliteration: La ilaha illa Allah wahdahu la sharika lah.
items.translation: There is no deity except Allah alone, without partner.

items.title: For guidance
items.arabic: رَبَّنَا لَا تُزِغْ قُلُوبَنَا بَعْدَ إِذْ هَدَيْتَنَا
items.transliteration: Rabbana la tuzigh qulubana ba'da idh hadaytana.
items.translation: Our Lord, do not let our hearts deviate after You have guided us.

items.title: For beneficial knowledge
items.arabic: رَبِّ زِدْنِي عِلْمًا
items.translation: My Lord, increase me in knowledge.

items.title: Tasbih after salah
items.arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ، الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ، اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ
items.translation: Glory be to Allah, praise be to Allah, Allah is the Greatest.

items.title: Seeking forgiveness
items.arabic: أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللَّهَ
items.translation: I seek Allah's forgiveness.
